sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 356 & 357 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection Nos.3,19 & 21 2. For orders on CMA No.456/2017 3. For orders on CMA No.457/2017 4. For hearing of main case 23.01.2026 Mr. Hanif Faisal Alam, advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel, question before the court is covered against the applicant by virtue of Division Bench judgment of this court in the case of Wazir Ali Industries vs. Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue Karachi, reported as 2012 PTD 405. In view hereof, learned counsel states that these reference applications may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
